firstFeature.title: You haven't read anything yet.
firstFeature.dek: Ask Klara for a micro-story. Five minutes, no rush.

latest.fallbackDek: A small scene from everyday life.

newStory.title: Another story
newStory.dek: Ask Klara about a different topic.

dek.unknown: The words you save come back just before you'd forget them.
dek.none: Nothing for now. Come back after reading something.

chat.title: Talk with Klara
chat.dek: Free conversation, whatever's on your mind.

genderReview.title: Review genders
genderReview.dek: Revisit the der, die, das you miss.

module.empty: No module yet. Generate your first story to start.

newstory.title: What shall we talk about today?
newstory.sub: One word is enough. Or let Klara choose.

input.placeholder: A bakery on a Saturday at 8…

dek.practiced_one: Nice. You practiced your pronunciation on {{count}} sentence.
dek.practiced_other: Nice. You practiced your pronunciation on {{count}} sentences.
dek.read: Nice. Klara read the story for you.

quiz.title: Before we close, four questions.
quiz.sub: One to lock in comprehension, another to produce it. If you don’t have it on hand, you can reveal the answer.

mc.heardButNoMatch: I heard «{{transcript}}», but it doesn’t match any option.
mc.noSpeech: Didn’t catch that. Let’s try again.

cloze.nailed: Nailed it. Said it without a hint.
cloze.close: It was «{{answer}}». Let’s try that word again later.
cloze.wasRevealed: It was «{{answer}}». Bumped to the front of the queue.

souvenir.title: The line that stays
souvenir.sub: Of the whole story, this one stands on its own.

insight.title: One thing to notice
insight.unavailable: Klara didn’t find a clear pattern this time.

l1Notes.title: Gender traps
l1Notes.hint: The gender differs between your language and German.

genderReview.title: Gender review
genderReview.empty: Genders you miss come back here. None for now.
genderReview.failed: Couldn't load the review. Try again in a moment.

setup.dek: It’s not a test. Klara picked these from what you’ve already read — some tripped you up, others come back for review. Say them out loud, at your own pace.

loading.error: Couldn't load your practice. Try again.
loading.empty: Nothing to practise yet. Come back after reading a story.

summary.dek: No rush and no streak. What you said today, and when you say it again.

pron.title: Speaking
pron.dek: The sentences that trip you up, out loud again.

gender.title: Genders
gender.dek: The der, die, das you miss.

error.mic_denied: We need permission to use your microphone.
error.mic_unavailable: Your browser doesn't support audio recording.
error.no_speech: We didn't catch any speech. Speak louder and record again.
error.audio_too_large: The recording is too long. Try a shorter sentence.
error.audio_undecodable: We couldn't process the audio. Try again.
error.service_unavailable: Pronunciation scoring isn't available right now.
error.scoring_failed: Scoring failed on our side. Give it a moment and try again.
error.network: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and retry.

gate.title: German first.
gate.dek: Voice conversation opens first in German. Your language is coming soon.

opener.native: Today we tune the {{sound}}. How was your day? Did you have to wait anywhere?

tip.de_ue: Round your lips as for “u”, but say “ee”.

note.legend: I underline the word where the {{sound}} needs another pass.
note.clear: The {{sound}} in “{{word}}” — clear. Let's go on.

transcript.improved: There it is. The {{sound}} in “{{word}}”, clear. ✓

hint.idle: Answer out loud — Klara listens to how your {{sound}} sounds
hint.listening: Tap again to end your turn
hint.noSpeech: I didn't hear you. Try again, a little louder.
hint.lowConfidence: I didn't quite get you. Say it again, calmly.

summary.dek: {{minutes}} min of conversation. The {{sound}} is getting closer — these words go back to Practice to lock it in.
summary.saveFailed: We couldn't save these words to Practice this time.
summary.partial_one: 1 word couldn't be prepared this time.
summary.partial_other: {{count}} words couldn't be prepared this time.

languages.title: What language do you speak, and which one do you want to learn?

context.title: Tell Klara how you learn best
context.label: Your context (optional)
context.placeholder: I learn by listening to podcasts and reading news…

password.title: Want to add a password as backup?
password.hint: You signed in with Google. If you'd like, add a password so you can also log in with email.
password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Your profile with Klara
settings.sub: Klara adapts the stories to this information.

field.name: Name
field.contextPlaceholder: e.g. I use it for work, I travel often, I'm into cooking…

settings.sameLangWarn: Pick a language different from your native one.

error.sameLang: Your native language and the language you're learning must be different.

invitations.help: Create a link and send it to a friend. Each link works once.
invitations.emailLabel: Email (optional — locks the link to that person)
invitations.empty: You haven't created any invitations yet.

security.title: Set a password
security.hint: You signed in with Google only. Add a password if you'd like to also log in with email.
security.gateHint: You're the owner. Set a backup password so you don't depend on Google alone.

error.googleFailed: Couldn't sign in with Google. Please try again.

signup.title: Create account

inviteOnly.title: Invitation-only signup
inviteOnly.body: Access to Klara is invitation-only. Ask the admin for a link and open it here.

error.inviteInvalid: This invitation link is not valid.
error.inviteUsed: This invitation link has already been used.
error.inviteRevoked: This invitation link has been revoked.

signup.verifyEmailSent: We sent you an email to confirm your address.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.error: We couldn't verify your email. The link may have expired.

reset.forgotSent: If you have an account with that email, we sent a reset link to your inbox.
reset.forgotSentHint: Didn't arrive? Check spam, try another email, or go back and sign in with Google.
reset.success: Done. You can sign in with your new password.

errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before continuing.
